ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school or training center */,
  "school_code" TEXT /* Code of the school or training center */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school or training center */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the school or training center */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the school or training center */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the school or training center */,
  "district_code" TEXT /* Code of the district where the school or training center is located */,
  "establishment_date" TEXT /* Date when the training center was established */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director or head of the training center */,
  "director_contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the director */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of learners the training center can accommodate */,
  "facilities" TEXT /* Facilities available at the training center */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the training center */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the training center's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_district_code FOREIGN KEY ("district_code") REFERENCES districts ("district_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Code of the course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the course */,
  "monthly_fee" INTEGER /* Monthly fee for the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the course */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary instructor for the course */,
  "course_schedule" TEXT /* Schedule of the course */,
  "course_materials_required" TEXT /* List of materials required for the course */,
  "course_evaluation_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria used to evaluate learners in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "learner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the learner */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the enrollment (e.g., paid, pending) */,
  "enrollment_reason" TEXT /* Reason for enrolling in the course */,
  "referral_source" TEXT /* Source of referral for the course */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., cash, online) */,
  "scholarship_status" TEXT /* Scholarship status (e.g., yes, no) */,
  "scholarship_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of the scholarship, if applicable */,
  "enrollment_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the enrollment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_completions" (
  "completion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course completion */,
  "learner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the learner */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date of course completion */,
  "certificate_issued" INTEGER /* Indicates if a certificate has been issued */,
  "final_assessment_score" REAL /* Final assessment score of the learner */,
  "certificate_issued_date" TEXT /* Date when the certificate was issued */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer who issued the certificate */,
  "additional_certifications" TEXT /* Additional certifications earned by the learner */,
  "completion_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the course completion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("completion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_completions_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_completions_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_code" TEXT /* Code of the district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the district is located */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the district */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the contact person for the district */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the district */,
  "number_of_training_centers" INTEGER /* Number of training centers in the district */,
  "average_income" INTEGER /* Average income in the district */,
  "literacy_rate" REAL /* Literacy rate in the district */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the district */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the district's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainers" (
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trainer */,
  "trainer_name" TEXT /* Name of the trainer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the trainer */,
  "mobile_number" TEXT /* Mobile number of the trainer */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise of the trainer */,
  "training_center_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training center where the trainer is based */,
  "date_of_joining" TEXT /* Date when the trainer joined the training center */,
  "previous_experience" TEXT /* Previous experience of the trainer */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications of the trainer */,
  "training_center_name" TEXT /* Name of the training center where the trainer is based */,
  "trainer_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the trainer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trainer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trainers_training_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_center_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, trainer, support staff) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "user_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of permissions assigned to the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the role */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was last modified */,
  "role_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., learner, course, trainer) */,
  "user_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the access log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "learner_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "learner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the learner */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date of the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the learner (1-5) */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., course, trainer, facilities) */,
  "followup_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if follow-up is required */,
  "followup_date" TEXT /* Date when follow-up was performed */,
  "followup_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes from the follow-up */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_learner_feedback_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_learner_feedback_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course material */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of the material (e.g., PDF, video, document) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the material */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the material was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the material */,
  "material_description" TEXT /* Description of the material */,
  "material_size" TEXT /* Size of the material file */,
  "material_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_materials_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_materials_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "learner_course_material_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "learner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the learner */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the material was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "device_used" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the material */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_learner_course_material_access_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES course_materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "learner_employment" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment record */,
  "learner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the learner */,
  "employment_date" TEXT /* Date of employment */,
  "employer_name" TEXT /* Name of the employer */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the learner */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Monthly salary of the learner */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the job */,
  "employment_type" TEXT /* Type of employment (e.g., full-time, part-time, freelance) */,
  "employment_duration" TEXT /* Duration of employment */,
  "employment_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the employment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id")
)
